recommendations.title: Don't Look Now
recommendations.overview: While grieving a terrible loss, a married couple meet two mysterious sisters, one of whom gives them a message sent from the afterlife.

recommendations.title: Performance
recommendations.overview: In underworld terms, Chas Devlin is a 'performer,' a gangster with a talent for violence and intimidation. Turner is a reclusive rock superstar. When Chas and Turner meet, their worlds collide—and the impact is both exotic and explosive.

recommendations.title: The Whale
recommendations.overview: A reclusive English teacher suffering from severe obesity attempts to reconnect with his estranged teenage daughter for one last chance at redemption.

recommendations.title: Nevada Smith

recommendations.title: A-X-L
recommendations.overview: The life of a teenage boy is forever altered by a chance encounter with cutting edge military technology.

recommendations.title: Hungry Hearts
recommendations.overview: The relationship of a couple who meet by chance in New York City is put to the test when they encounter a life or death circumstance.
